summary: Normalize chunk-id → corpus-path resolution at all read sites (defensive fallback for case/space mismatch in tradition prefix)

files.note: inline lookup:25 — degrades to label, no body
_load_chunk_body:186 — already has fallback, fold into helper
line 264 — already has fallback, fold into helper
line 211 — already normalizes, fold into helper

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content:
chunk_id format is '<TraditionVal>.<text_id>.<NNN>' but corpus dirs are lowercase snake_case. ~13,788 of 15,371 staged_tags rows (~90%) silently return empty body via 'if not chunk_file.exists(): return ""'. Only gnosticism (1055), hermeticism (474), jewish_mysticism (54) match.

Tradition prefix counts in staged_tags: Neoplatonism=4721, Egyptian=2561, Taoism=1765, Christian Mysticism=1745, Greek Mystery=1424, gnosticism=1055, Zoroastrianism=955, hermeticism=474, Jewish Mysticism=423, Buddhism=107, Mesopotamian=87, jewish_mysticism=54.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Extract _resolve_chunk_path(chunk_id) -> Path|None helper that mirrors guru/retriever.py:186-200 (try raw, then .lower().replace(' ', '_')). Route 4 broken sites through it: scripts/review_tags.py:34, scripts/propose_edges.py:107, scripts/review_edges.py:34, scripts/seed_tags.py:25. Optionally fold the 3 already-normalizing sites (guru/retriever.py:194, scripts/vector_store.py:264, scripts/tag_concepts.py:211) into the same helper. No DB migration. Becomes dead code once 9ec1dcee lands.
